title: Family Procedure Rule Committee: Annual open meeting 3 November 2025
body: "The November 2025 meeting of the Family Procedure Rule Committee (‘The Committee’) will be the annual open event where invited attendees will be able to observe proceedings and put questions to the Committee, which are sent in advance of the meeting.  The meeting will take place on Monday, 3 November 2025 via MS Teams and is due to start at 11:00am. Attendees will not be able to be involved in the normal business of the Committee discussed on the day, but there will be a section dedicated to hearing their input and questions.  If you wish to attend the meeting please reply using the  form  (MS Word Document, 43.1 KB) by Wednesday 17 September 2025 at the very latest or directly to the FPRC Secretariat by email: FPRCSecretariat@justice.gov.uk.  The Secretariat will contact you after the closing date to confirm further details. "
